title: mimulus levigatus
intro: Mimulus levigatus, also known as the smooth monkey flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Mimulus levigatus include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
